sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 어플라이드 머티어리얼즈는 2025 회계연도 연간 매출 283억 7,000만 달러로 사상 최대 실적을 달성했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025 회계연도 연간 매출은 전년 대비 4% 증가한 283억 7,000만 달러를 기록하며 사상 최대치를 달성했습니다.
연간 GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 8.66달러, 비GAAP 기준 EPS는 9.42달러로 각각 사상 최고치를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 로직, DRAM, 첨단 패키징 분야의 리더십을 강화하고 있으며, 2026년 하반기부터 증가할 수요에 대비해 운영 및 서비스 조직을 준비 중입니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 매출은 68억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 3% 감소했습니다.
4분기 GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 2.38달러로 전년 동기 대비 14% 증가했습니다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 하반기부터 본격화될 것으로 예상되는 반도체 수요 증가가 실제 매출 성장으로 이어지는지 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 exhibit991q42025earningsre.htm EX-99.1 EARNINGS RELEASE Document Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Contact: Mike Sullivan (408) 986-7977 mike_sullivan@amat.com Media Contact: Ricky Gradwohl (408) 235-4676 ricky_gradwohl@amat.com APPLIED MATERIALS ANNOUNCES FOURTH QUARTER AND FISCAL YEAR 2025 RESULTS • Record annual revenue $28.37 billion, up 4 percent year over year • Record annual GAAP EPS $8.66 and record non-GAAP EPS $9.42, up 1 percent and 9 percent year over year, respectively • Quarterly revenue $6.80 billion, down 3 percent year over year • Quarterly GAAP EPS $2.38 and non-GAAP EPS $2.17, up 14 percent and down 6 percent year over year, respectively SANTA CLARA, Calif., Nov. 13, 2025 — Applied   Normalized numeric aliases: $28.37 billion = 283억 7,000만 달러; $6.80 billion = 68억 달러; $28.37 = 28.37달러; $8.66 = 8.66달러; $9.42 = 9.42달러; $6.80 = 6.80달러; $2.38 = 2.38달러; $2.17 = 2.17달러; 1 percent = 1%; 4 percent = 4%; 9 percent = 9%; 3 percent = 3%; 14 percent = 14%; 6 percent = 6%.

ctors and wafer fab equipment, Applied Materials delivered its sixth consecutive year of growth in fiscal 2025,” said Gary Dickerson, President and CEO. “We are well positioned at the highest value technology inflections in the fastest growing areas of the market, enabling us to extend our leadership in leading-edge logic, DRAM and advanced packaging as next-generation technologies ramp in volume production over the coming years.” “Based on our conversations with our customers and partners, we are preparing Applied’s operations and service organizations to be ready to support higher demand beginning in the second half of calendar 2026,” said Brice Hill, Senior Vice President and CFO. “We have targeted our R&D investments to create new products and technologies that will enable even faster and more energy-efficient transistors, chips and systems and drive our growth in the years ahead.” A
